title: Luxury stocks fall as Iran war weighs on earnings; Hermes sinks 14%
summary_full: Hermes said wholesale activity was "significantly affected" in the first quarter by lower sales to concession stores, particularly in the Middle East and in airports.
summary_public: Hermes said wholesale activity was "significantly affected" in the first quarter by lower sales to concession stores, particularly in the Middle East and in airports.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Luxury stocks fall as Iran war weighs on earnings
